# Mission 14 - Customer / Vehicle Foundation Design

## Mission Name
Mission 14 - Customer / Vehicle Foundation Design

## Mission Goal
Lock the Customer and Vehicle foundation design for MOGHARE360 ERP Soft Run.

## Current Project Phase
Core ERP Foundation + Controlled Admin Prototype

## Dependencies
Completed:
- Mission 5 = Admin Read-Only Workflow Viewer
- Mission 6 = Foundation Lock + 70-Day Control Register
- Mission 7 = Auth Context Design Pack
- Mission 8 = Auth Context Helper Implementation
- Mission 9 = Permission Enforcement Guard Map
- Mission 10 = Permission Guard Helper Implementation
- Mission 11 = Access Denied Audit Prototype
- Mission 12 = Auth + Permission + Workflow Integration Test
- Mission 13 = Access Request UI Consolidation

## Mission Boundary
Mission 14 is design only.

No code is created.
No SQL is executed.
No database is changed.
No Customer Portal is changed.
No legacy file is changed.

## Next Mission
Mission 15 - Customer / Vehicle Controlled Create Prototype

Mission 15 must not start until Mission 14 is completed, committed, pushed, and reported.
